/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/framework.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/callbacks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/utilities.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/debug.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/shaderProgram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/meshGeometry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/modelTexture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/sphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/light.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/skybox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/envMap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.cpp.dir/noise.cpp.o -o main.cpp  -Wl,-rpath,/home/martul3ns/projects/planetary-rain/src/_deps/assimp-build/bin /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libGLU.so libglew.a _deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a _deps/assimp-build/bin/libassimp.so.5.3.0 libimgui.a /usr/lib64/libglut.so /usr/lib64/libXi.so -lGL -lGLU -lm -lpthread -ldl -lX11 -lXrandr -lXi _deps/assimp-build/contrib/zlib/libzlibstatic.a -lrt libglew.a /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libGLU.so
